100.$description: Primitive radius step. Raw value — reference via semantic tokens.

max.$description: Fully-rounded primitive. Produces a pill on any element shorter than it is wide.

100.$description: Base unit. The 4px grid everything derives from.

300.$description: 3× base. Open as a picker fallback for one-off spacing.

400.$description: 4× base. Open as a picker fallback for one-off spacing.

500.$description: 6× base. Open as a picker fallback for one-off spacing.

600.$description: 8× base. Open as a picker fallback for one-off spacing.

display.$description: Display face. Bold weight only — the family ships Regular/Bold. Used for the oversized name treatment in hero/footer and for heading-1 section headers. Never for body copy.

primary.$description: Workhorse family. Body text at all sizes, headings 2–3, labels, buttons, and navigation. Variable font — Regular 400, Medium 500, SemiBold 600 all in use.

mono.$description: Annotation face. Captions, timestamps, image credits, project role/date metadata. Signals 'annotation', not 'code'. Never for running prose.
